hardware: c8a.4xlarge (AMD Zen5 EPYC 9R45, 16 vCPU) on-demand, ap-northeast-1
change: wide store-out: 073's planar kernel ended each doc-group with 8 complete distances in one zmm, then disassembled it lane-by-lane — 8 extract/store pairs (vmovd/vpextrd/vextracti128/vextracti32x4), each with its own cmp/je tail-guard, plus an acc-pointer reload between extractions (~24 uops/doc of store-out tax, see /alu/073). Fix: pad acc to whole groups of 8 (tail bound moves out of the hot loop; selection still reads only acc[..t]), then narrow+store in two instructions: _mm512_cvtepi64_epi32 (vpmovqd) + one 32 B _mm256_storeu_si256. Scalar fallback path simplified as well.
gain: +13% over 073 at C=2000 (1307 -> 1471). Tile optimum stays 32. Final operating points: 3 reps, latency-queries=100, deltas measured same-box same-session vs 073.
note: objdump confirms: vpmovqd present in the funnel region (6 sites incl. remainder paths); the per-lane extraction chain is gone from the group loop. Loop is now ~20 uops/doc: 4 broadcasts + 4 folded-load XORs + 4 popcounts + 3 adds + narrow + store + loop control — essentially irreducible at this ISA. Cumulative kernel-only arc: 2.26x, recall bit-identical throughout.
